name: @rulesets/compiler
description: Compiler for Rulesets to destination formats

scripts.build: rimraf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --minify && tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --skipLibCheck src/index.ts
scripts.dev: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --watch & tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --skipLibCheck --watch src/index.ts
